trades.reasoning: MACD has crossed below signal line (bearish divergence) while price is flat at cost basis — weakest technical setup in the portfolio; rotating proceeds into higher-conviction momentum names
Score 95 with rising MACD histogram, RSI 69.7 in the ideal bullish zone, and price above SMA-20 — the only score-95 name showing an accelerating MACD histogram, indicating strengthening momentum
Score 95 with volume surge (>1.5x average), MACD bullish crossover, and price 18% above SMA-20 — multi-signal confirmation of a sustained uptrend with institutional participation

decisions.briefing: Markets were modestly negative today (S&P -0.4%, NASDAQ -0.1%), signalling mild caution rather than outright risk-off. With only $105 in cash, I rotated out of SMCI — our flattest hold with a freshly bearish MACD — to fund two of the highest-scoring setups on the screener. TSLA and AAON both carry score-95 readings with volume confirmation and MACD crossovers, making them the most technically sound entries available today.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities closed modestly lower on Thursday, with the S&P 500 declining 0.4% and the NASDAQ edging down 0.1%, as investors maintained a cautious posture amid ongoing uncertainty around trade policy and upcoming economic data. Sector rotation continued beneath the surface, with momentum names holding up better than cyclicals as market participants favoured companies with strong earnings visibility. The shallow pullback suggests consolidation after recent gains rather than a directional breakdown.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股週四小幅收低，標普500指數跌0.4%，納斯達克指數微跌0.1%，市場情緒謹慎，投資者持觀望態度，靜待貿易政策走向明朗及重要經濟數據出爐。盤面資金持續輪動，動能強勁、盈利能見度高的個股表現相對抗跌，週期性板塊則承壓較大。整體跌幅溫和，顯示市場在近期累積漲幅後進入消化整固階段，技術面尚未出現趨勢性破位訊號。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Portfolio rotation means selling positions that are losing momentum or showing technical deterioration, and redeploying that capital into stronger setups. Today we sold SMCI — flat at cost with a bearish MACD — and used the proceeds to enter TSLA and AAON, which both show score-95 readings with volume and MACD confirmation. The goal is to keep capital working in the highest-conviction opportunities rather than letting it stagnate in trades that have lost their edge.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 投資組合輪動是指賣出動能衰退或技術面轉差的持倉，將資金重新部署至更具潛力的標的。今日我們賣出MACD轉空、價格停滯不前的SMCI，將資金轉入技術評分同達95分、成交量放大且MACD出現黃金交叉的TSLA與AAON。這一策略的核心邏輯在於讓資金持續集中於最具信心的交易機會，避免資金被套在已失去優勢的倉位上白白消耗時間成本。
